tecnologia.titulo: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, hopes to offer safer AI therapy
tecnologia.resumen: The Path says its AI model has scored 95 on the mental health safety AI benchmark, Vera-MH. This compares to a top score of 65 for the consumer bots.

tecnologia.resumen: Brett Adcock's new AI startup is now valued at $6 billion by its investors.

tecnologia.titulo: Maka Kids is redefining kids’ screen time with a streaming app optimized for well-being, not engagement
tecnologia.resumen: Maka Kids is building a streaming app for children ages zero to six featuring content designed for healthy development. The startup has now raised $3 million in seed funding to scale its platform.
